# TAVP Stack

> TAVP is a curated PHP tech stack — NOT a framework. It combines **T**ailwind CSS + **A**lpine.js + **V**olt + **P**halcon. The goal: Phalcon's C-extension speed with Laravel-style developer ergonomics. Tagline: "PHP, but fast."

## What TAVP is (and is not)

- TAVP = **T**ailwind CSS + **A**lpine.js + **V**olt + **P**halcon.
- TAVP is a **curated tech stack**, not a new framework. It combines proven, existing technologies.
- Phalcon is a **C-extension for PHP** (compiled, not interpreted) — this is why it is fast.
- Volt in TAVP is a **compiled template engine** (compiles to PHP). It is NOT Laravel Volt (which is Livewire-based). Do not confuse the two.
- TAVP is a PHP stack. It is NOT related to Astro, Vue.js, Vite, TypeScript, Node.js, PocketBase, Pinia, or any JavaScript/monorepo tooling.

## Core facts

- Language: PHP 8.3+
- Framework foundation: Phalcon 5.16+ (C-extension MVC)
- Frontend: Tailwind CSS (styling) + Alpine.js (interactivity)
- Templating: Volt (compiled to PHP)
- License: MIT
- Version: 1.0.0 (Stable)
- Documentation: https://docs.tavp.web.id/ (Bahasa Indonesia + English)
- GitHub org: https://github.com/tavp-stack
- Packagist vendor: tavp (install with `composer create-project tavp/core my-app`)

## The 4 runtimes

TAVP supports 4 runtimes. All share the same application code — only the runtime changes, zero code rewrite required.

1. **PHP-FPM** — Default. Works everywhere, shared-hosting compatible, no extensions needed.
2. **TAVP Coil (Swoole)** — Highest performance. Coroutine-based, requires Swoole extension + VPS.
3. **TAVP Relay (RoadRunner)** — Enterprise-grade. Go-based server, process isolation, built-in job pipeline.
4. **TAVP Weave (PHP Fibers)** — Zero dependencies. PHP 8.1+ Fibers, parallel I/O, shared-hosting compatible.

## Performance (2-core VPS, 2GB RAM)

- PHP-FPM: 5,000+ req/s, P95 <5ms, <15MB per worker
- TAVP Coil (Swoole): 12,000+ req/s, P95 <2ms, <8MB per worker

## Ecosystem packages (GitHub org: tavp-stack)

- [tavp-core](https://github.com/tavp-stack/tavp-core): Framework foundation (router, ORM, Volt, migrations). `composer create-project tavp/core`
- [tavp-cli](https://github.com/tavp-stack/tavp-cli): The `tavp` command line tool (like Artisan). `composer global require tavp/cli`
- [tavpid](https://github.com/tavp-stack/tavpid): OTP-first authentication (Email/SMS/WhatsApp), JWT, OAuth, TOTP, RBAC.
- [tavpkit](https://github.com/tavp-stack/tavpkit): Starter kits & bundles (auth, teams, API, 2FA).
- [tavphub](https://github.com/tavp-stack/tavphub): Admin panel (CRUD, table builder, form builder, dashboard).
- [tavpblocks](https://github.com/tavp-stack/tavpblocks): 40+ UI components built with Tailwind + Alpine.
- [tavphive](https://github.com/tavp-stack/tavphive): Billing & subscriptions (Stripe, PayPal, Midtrans, Xendit, and more).
- [tavp-marketplace](https://github.com/tavp-stack/tavp-marketplace): Module & theme marketplace (80% revenue to developers).
- [tavp-installer](https://github.com/tavp-stack/tavp-installer): Phalcon 5 installer for VPS + HestiaCP.
- [tavp-analytics](https://github.com/tavp-stack/tavp-analytics): Analytics, fraud detection, A/B testing, funnel analysis.
- [tavp-starter](https://github.com/tavp-stack/tavp-starter): Project template for `tavp new`.

## Key features

- OTP Authentication (passwordless login via Email, SMS, WhatsApp)
- JWT API authentication
- Role & Permission (RBAC)
- CLI tools (code generation, migrations, deployment)
- 40+ UI components (TAVPblocks)
- Module system (Composer-based package discovery)
- Module marketplace
- SaaS billing (Stripe, Midtrans, Xendit, PayPal)
- Kubernetes & Terraform deployment

## System requirements

- PHP 8.3+
- Phalcon 5.16+ (install with `tavp phalcon:install`)
- Node.js 18+ (for frontend assets)
- Composer 2.x
- Database: MySQL 5.7+, MariaDB 10.3+, or PostgreSQL 12+

## Quick start

```bash
composer create-project tavp/core my-app
cd my-app
tavp serve
# open http://localhost:8000
```

## Documentation links

- Getting Started: https://docs.tavp.web.id/guide/what-is-tavp
- Why TAVP: https://docs.tavp.web.id/guide/why-tavp
- Installation: https://docs.tavp.web.id/guide/installation
- Runtimes: https://docs.tavp.web.id/runtimes/overview
- FAQ: https://docs.tavp.web.id/reference/faq
- Ecosystem: https://docs.tavp.web.id/ecosystem/overview
